metadata.final_recipe_summary: PET_FILM_GRADE_A optimized recipe RCP-HOLD-FINAL. heatset=220.5, td_draw=3.69, relax=4.42. Biref_mean=0.0906-0.0933 (20tick mean ~0.0922). Biref_cv=3.23-3.46 (safe margin 0.24 to 3.70 limit). All hard guardrails green. Optimization stopped per stop_conditions.
metadata.note: 优化停止 — 已进入 close-to-target zone (biref_mean < 0.092)，连续稳定超过 20 ticks。配方冻结为 hold_validation 最终版本。
